title: Juice Of The Fruits
description: Adding more bushes and more food items.
body:
# Juice Of The Fruits
## ersion 2.1.0
This mod adds several fruits in the style of the minecraft sweet berries.
- The fruits include basic juices that are crafted using the Food Processor and Blades.
- All fruit bushes will spawn in the world similar to how sweet berries spawn.
- The fruiits include a dried version crafted by using the Food Processor and Fan Blades

More features will be added in the coming versions
